scene.message: Elly: I'm not fond of{nl} people like this...{waitkey}{ret}
Clerk: Here we exchange{nl} coins for items...{waitkey}{clearbox}Change coins into items?{ctl0e:0}{ret}
Customer: I-{wait_fr:21}I see...{waitkey}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There's a Poker game.{waitkey}{ret}
What will you do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
Which explanation?{nl} {ctl0e:5}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There's a Blackjack{nl} game.{waitkey}{ret}
What will you do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
Which explanation?{nl} {ctl0e:5}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There's a Slot Machine.{waitkey}{ret}
What will you do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
Which explanation?{nl} {ctl0e:6}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There's a Dice game.{waitkey}{ret}
What will you do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
Which explanation?{nl} {ctl0e:6}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl12} Metal Cards.{waitkey}{ret}
There's a Code Breaker.{waitkey}{ret}
What will you do?{nl} {ctl0e:24}{ret}
Which explanation?{nl} {ctl0e:6}{ret}
